ddls:
CREATE TABLE "document_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "sub_option" TEXT /* Sub-option name for the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration sub-option */,
  "mth" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'mth' (e.g., Markdown, LaTeX) support */,
  "fdp" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'fdp' (e.g., PDF, DOCX) support */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'row' (e.g., R, Python) support */,
  "tdo" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'tdo' (e.g., TeX, HTML) support */,
  "ftr" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'ftr' (e.g., figures, tables) support */,
  "dm" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'dm' (e.g., document metadata) support */,
  "utig" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'utig' (e.g., user themes, images) support */,
  "ilsoi" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'ilsoi' (e.g., inline styles, other integrations) support */,
  "ydils" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'ydils' (e.g., YAML, other data) support */,
  "aeb" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for 'aeb' (e.g., additional extensions, behaviors) support */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., research paper, presentation, web content) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the configuration is active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in configurations */,
  "parent_config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link to the parent configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Editor, Author) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the configuration being tracked */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., research paper, presentation, web content) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the document is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the document being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user's role in the collaboration */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user joined the collaboration */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user left the collaboration (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)
